ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "starttime" TEXT /* Start time of the trip */,
  "stoptime" TEXT /* Stop time of the trip */,
  "bikeid" TEXT /* Identifier for the bike used */,
  "tripduration" REAL /* Duration of the trip in seconds */,
  "from_station_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the station where the trip started */,
  "to_station_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the station where the trip ended */,
  "usertype" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., Annual Member, Short-Term Pass Holder) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "birthyear" INTEGER /* Birth year of the user */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who took the trip */,
  "route_id" TEXT /* ID of the route taken */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the trip */,
  "traffic_conditions" TEXT /* Traffic conditions during the trip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_to_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_from_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the station */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Number of bikes the station can hold */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "nearby_landmarks" TEXT /* Notable points of interest near the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "usertype" TEXT /* User type (e.g., Annual Member, Short-Term Pass Holder) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "birthyear" INTEGER /* Birth year of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "membership_start_date" TEXT /* Date the user started their membership */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bikes" (
  "bike_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each bike */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bike (e.g., Available, In Repair) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Last maintenance date for the bike */,
  "bike_type" TEXT /* Type of bike (e.g., electric, standard) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the bike */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year the bike was manufactured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the summary record */,
  "total_trips" INTEGER /* Total number of trips recorded */,
  "average_duration" REAL /* Average duration of trips in seconds */,
  "peak_usage_time" TEXT /* Peak usage time for trips */,
  "summary_date" TEXT /* Date the summary was generated */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the summary was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the feedback record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip related to the feedback */,
  "comments" TEXT /* User comments on the trip */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5 scale) */,
  "suggestion" TEXT /* Suggestions provided by the user */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the analysis record */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip analyzed */,
  "duration_category" TEXT /* Category of trip duration (e.g., Short, Medium, Long) */,
  "user_category" TEXT /* Category of user (e.g., Regular, Occasional) */,
  "route_popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score for the route */,
  "route_efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency score for the route taken */,
  "bike_usage_impact" REAL /* Impact of the trip on bike usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_analysis_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the maintenance log */,
  "bike_id" TEXT /* ID of the bike that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id")
)
